hero.title: the World
hero.description: Our mission is to build bridges between people and cultures by making language learning fun and easy through technological innovation.

story.title: Story
story.subtitle: Building Bridges Through Language
story.description: Lango was founded in 2020 with a simple yet powerful vision: to make language learning accessible to everyone, everywhere. What started as a small team of passionate linguists has grown into a global community of learners and native speakers dedicated to breaking down language barriers.
story.missionText: We believe that language should never be a barrier to connection, opportunity, or understanding. Through innovative technology and human-centered teaching, we're on a mission to help millions of people communicate across cultures and borders.

team.title: Something About Our
team.subtitle: Language
team.description: Our team is made up of passionate linguists, educators, and technology experts from around the world. We bring together the best minds in language education to create innovative learning experiences that help you achieve fluency faster. We are constantly evolving our methods based on the latest research.

office.title: Our Beautiful
office.subtitle: Office
office.description1: Our beautiful office is located in the heart of San Francisco, California. It's where creativity meets innovation. Our modern workspace encourages collaboration and fosters a culture of learning. We have dedicated language labs, a cozy library, and flexible workspaces that inspire our team to create the best language learning experience for you.
office.description2: Visit us at our headquarters or join our virtual office. We welcome visitors and believe in open collaboration.

hero.title: Transparent

enterprise.title: Need a Custom Solution?
enterprise.description: We offer enterprise plans for organizations with specific requirements. Contact us for a tailored solution.
